GENERAL.DPS_POLICIES: Read our privacy policy and our policy of Digital Payroll Services.

VALIDATION_ERRORS.GENDER_DOES_NOT_MATCH_SSN: The gender does not match with the social security number
VALIDATION_ERRORS.BIRTH_DATE_DOES_NOT_MATCH_SSN: The birth date does not match with the social security number
VALIDATION_ERRORS.IBAN_INVALID: The bank account number is invalid
VALIDATION_ERRORS.EMPLOYEE_WAGE_MIN: The gross hourly wage value should be at least {{min}}
VALIDATION_ERRORS.EMPLOYEE_WAGE_MAX: The gross hourly wage value can only be {{max}} at most
VALIDATION_ERRORS.MEAL_VOUCHERS_TOTAL_MIN: The mealvouchers' total value has to be at least {{min}}
VALIDATION_ERRORS.MEAL_VOUCHERS_TOTAL_MAX: The mealvouchers' total value can only be {{max}} at most
VALIDATION_ERRORS.MEAL_VOUCHERS_EMPLOYEE_MIN: The mealvouchers' employee's share should be at least {{min}}
VALIDATION_ERRORS.ADDRESS_STREET_NUMBER_INVALID: Invalid address - make sure to include a number
VALIDATION_ERRORS.MIN_CONTRACT_WORK_DURATION_PER_PC: For this PC code, a higher minimum of contract hours is applied.
VALIDATION_ERRORS.LATE_CONTRACT: Starting time should be at least 30 minutes in future
VALIDATION_ERRORS.EXTRA_STATUTE_MULTI_DAY_CONTRACT: For the statute Extra only day contracts are allowed
VALIDATION_ERRORS.MAX_CONTRACT_DURATION: A contract can only be maximum {{maxDurationHours}} hours long.
VALIDATION_ERRORS.COMPANY_WORK_SCHEDULE_MAX: The standard full time work schedule cannot be more than {{maxHours}} hours.
VALIDATION_ERRORS.EMAIL_OR_NUMBER_REQUIRED: Email or whatsapp number cannot be empty

PLANNING.CREATE_CONTRACTS_WITH_ERRORS: Some contracts failed to get created

EMPLOYEE_PROFILE.DIFFERENT_RESIDENCY_ADDRESS: Is residency address different from legal address?

EMPLOYEE_PROFILE.NO_WAGES_IN_THIS_COMPANY: This employee does not yet have any pay packages with this client.

CONFIRM_EMPLOYEE_REMOVAL_DIALOG.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to remove this employee from the pool of {{companyName}}?

EMPLOYEE_WAGE.CHANGES_NOT_APPLIED_TO_EXISTING_CONTRACT: These changes are not automatically applied to pre-existing contracts, only to new contracts being scheduled. Adjust the already present contracts as well.
EMPLOYEE_WAGE.MISSING_ADDRESS: Address missing, not possible to auto-calculate

SEARCH.TITLE: Search
SEARCH.SEARCH_BY: Search by name, VAT or company registration number
SEARCH.SEARCH_INFO_TEXT: You can search by name and VAT number.</br></br>Want to add a new company? </br>Then search for this company by its VAT number.

COMPANY.BLOCKED_STATUS_MESSAGE: This company is blocked and cannot create contracts. Contact finance for more information via {{phoneNumber}}
COMPANY.BLOCK_CONTRACTS_FOR_LATE_ACTUALS: Block contracts for late actuals confirmations
COMPANY.COMPLETE_WITH_THIS_MAIL: Complete this company profile with this mailaddress
COMPANY.COMPLETE_SUGGESTION: Complete this company profile with this mailaddress
COMPANY.WARNING_MESSAGE_PENDING_ACTIONS: Don’t forget to create contracts for next week

WHATSAPP_DIALOG.TITLE: Enable WhatsApp reminders
WHATSAPP_DIALOG.INFO_TEXT:
We’d like to send you important reminders via WhatsApp — such as confirming employee work hours or creating the new planning for next week.
To do this, we need your explicit consent in accordance with WhatsApp’s policies.

By agreeing, you allow us to send you automated messages using WhatsApp Business.
You can withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us or managing your notification settings.
WHATSAPP_DIALOG.AGREE_TEXT: I agree to receive work-related action reminders and notifications via WhatsApp.
WHATSAPP_DIALOG.READ_GDPR_GUIDELINES: Learn more about our GDPR guidelines

COEFFICIENTS.MIN_MAX_VALIDATION: The {{fieldLabel}} is too low or too high.

CONTRACT.WHY_CANCEL_CONTRACT: Why do you want to cancel this contract?
CONTRACT.GIVE_SHIFT_NAME: Give a name to this new shift
CONTRACT.CREATE_SHIFT_TEMPLATE_CHECKBOX: I want to save these shift hours for reuse.
CONTRACT.COPY_SCHEDULE_TOOLTIP: Copy hours to other days in contract
CONTRACT.EMPLOYEE_HOURS_WEEKLY: Q (Average hours per employee per week)
CONTRACT.FILL_IN_ALL_CONTRACT_SCHEDULES: Make sure all working days hours are set
CONTRACT.CONTRACT_HAS_CONFIRMED_ACTUALS:
Actuals for this contract have already been confirmed.

CANCEL_CONTRACT_CONFIRMATION_DIALOG.MESSAGE: It could be that there are confirmed actuals already.

CONTRACT.PC_124_CONTRACT_DURATION: The duration of Contract for PC 124 needs to be at least two days.
CONTRACT.DIMONA_RULES_CHANGE_CREDIT: You can change the endtime of this contract only once.
CONTRACT.DIMONA_RULES_EXCEEDED_HOURS: Changing the contract endtime is not possible after 23:30
CONTRACT.DIMONA_RULES_EXCEEDED_7_5_HOURS: Changing contract endtime is only possible within 7.5h window after contract end time
CONTRACT.DIMONA_RULES_SAVE_CONTRACT: Are you sure you want to make this change? This will trigger a final Dimona change.

INVITE_EMPLOYEE.TITLE: New invitation
INVITE_EMPLOYEE.MAIL_INVITATION: Mail this invitation to your new employee
INVITE_EMPLOYEE.SEND_INVITATION_WITHOUT_MAIL: No e-mail? Then copy this invitation and deliver it to your new employee
INVITE_EMPLOYEE.WAGE_TOGGLE_INFO: Don't know the wage? Then click on 'Choose minimum wage' and we will first set the wage at {{minWage}} euros and then adjust to correct minimum wage.

AUTH.LOGIN_ERROR: Email address or password are not correct. Please check and try again.

EMPLOYEE_REGISTRATION.CONFIRM_CANCEL: Do you indeed want to cancel? All entered data will be lost.

INVITATION_WELCOME.TITLE: Welcome {{name}}
INVITATION_WELCOME.INVITATION_ALREADY_COMPLETED: This invitation has already been completed and is no longer valid.
INVITATION_WELCOME.ITSME_REGISTRATION_DURATION: This only takes 30 seconds and you can start immediately.
INVITATION_WELCOME.ITSME_REGISTRATION_INFO_TEXT: Attention! After you have entered your Itsme code, you still need to return to this page and go through the all steps until you get a confirmation screen. Only then is your registration completed.
INVITATION_WELCOME.CANT_CREATE_ITSME: I can't create an itsme<sup>®</sup> account
INVITATION_WELCOME.COMPLETE_PROFILE: Then complete your profile. This can take up to 15 minutes and your contract can only start after 72h.
INVITATION_WELCOME.NOT_VALID_INVITATION_LINK: This invitation is no longer valid. Please contact the employer to send you a new invitation.

SET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Choose a new password and complete the creation of your account.

COMPANY_TIME_REGISTRATION.NO_CONTRACTS_FOR_SELECTED_EMPLOYEE_DAY: There is no contract for this employee on this day.

COMPANY_ACTUALS.TITLE: Actuals
COMPANY_ACTUALS.BANNER_SUBTITLE: On this page you can submit and view the actuals of your employees.

OPTIONS_TREE.EMPLOYEE_PARTIALLY_ABSENT: The employee partly worked and was partly absent

CONTRACT_CONFIRMATION.CONFIRM_ALL_ACTUAL_DAYS: Go through all days to confirm the actuals
CONTRACT_CONFIRMATION.MIN_START_TIME_DAY_VALIDATION_ERROR: Starting hours can not be set earlier than 30 mins before original starting time
CONTRACT_CONFIRMATION.MIN_DAY_DURATION_VALIDATION_ERROR: Minimum contract duration is at least 2 hours
CONTRACT_CONFIRMATION.WORKED_AND_ABSENCE_HOURS_OVERLAP_VALIDAT: The worked and absent hours overlap
CONTRACT_CONFIRMATION.THIS_WEEK_PAYMENTS_STARTED:
Today is Tuesday: we are currently processing last week's wages. Therefore, actuals cannot be entered at this time.
Please note: Last week's achievements can only be reconfirmed for payment next week starting Wednesday.
Tip: Confirm your achievements on time, before midnight every Monday, to avoid unnecessary delays.
CONTRACT_CONFIRMATION.PUBLIC_HOLIDAY_NOTICE:
Due to tomorrow’s public holiday, we’re processing last week’s wages today. Therefore, actuals cannot be entered at this time.
Please note: Last week's actuals will be accessible for confirmation again on Wednesday.
Thank you for your understanding
